0.title: Discovery Call

why_choose_us.desc: We deliver high-performance digital products that help brands scale. Here is how we set ourselves apart from the competition.

card1.title: End-to-End Solutions
card1.desc: From strategic blueprinting to global deployment, we manage the entire technical lifecycle so your team can focus on market expansion.

card2.title: Next-Gen Stack Integration
card2.desc: Engineered using modern stacks including React, Node.js, Flutter, and Kotlin with guaranteed performance and scalability.

card3.title: Stack Flexibility
card3.desc: Tailor-made tech stack perfectly aligned with your business requirements, ensuring optimal performance, scalability, and long-term maintenance. Your vision, your stack, our expertise.

card4.title: Performance, Analytics & Support
card4.desc: Comprehensive post-launch maintenance, performance monitoring, and continuous improvement services to ensure your digital assets evolve with your business goals.

card5.title: Security Audits & Recovery
card5.desc: Protect your digital assets with our comprehensive security audit services. We identify vulnerabilities and provide robust recovery solutions to safeguard your data and operations.

card6.title: Future-Proof Innovation
card6.desc: Gain an immediate competitive edge. We inject bleeding-edge capabilities—from AI/LLMs to autonomous microservices—into your core product today.

about.p2_text: We turn your big ideas into high-performing digital campaigns. By combining market strategy with innovative tech, we build powerful brand identities that grab attention, boost customer engagement, and deliver measurable business growth.

website-development.name: Full Stack Web App Development
website-development.desc: Modern full-stack web applications built with Next.js, React, Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, authentication, dashboards, APIs, and production deployment.
website-development.whatsIncluded: I build complete full-stack web applications from idea to production using modern, fast, and scalable technologies. This service is ideal if you need a business app, SaaS platform, client portal, admin dashboard, booking system, marketplace, or custom web product.
website-development.bestFor: Startups, agencies, founders, and businesses that need a reliable developer to build a serious web application, not just a static website.

whatICanBuild.0: Full-stack web apps with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Node.js
whatICanBuild.1: Authentication, protected routes, user roles, and admin dashboards
whatICanBuild.2: REST APIs, database models, business logic, and backend workflows
whatICanBuild.3: MongoDB or PostgreSQL database design and integration
whatICanBuild.4: Responsive frontend UI with clean UX and fast loading speed
whatICanBuild.5: Production deployment with environment variables, domains, and SSL

0.title: Requirement review
0.desc: I review your app idea, features, users, workflows, and technical needs.

1.title: Architecture planning
1.desc: I plan the frontend, backend, database models, APIs, and development flow.

2.title: Development
2.desc: I build the application with clean code, responsive UI, and backend logic.

3.title: Testing and delivery
3.desc: I test key flows, fix issues, and prepare the app for production or handoff.

whatINeedFromYou.1: Design file, reference website, or rough wireframe if available
whatINeedFromYou.2: Preferred tech stack if already decided
whatINeedFromYou.4: Deployment details if you already have hosting

0.question: Can you build both frontend and backend?
0.answer: Yes, I provide complete end-to-end full stack development.

1.question: Which stack do you use?
1.answer: My primary stack is Next.js, React, Node.js, and MongoDB/PostgreSQL.

1.answer: We recommend Flutter for high-performance visual-first apps, and React Native for Javascript-heavy stacks.

digital-marketing.desc: Complete SEO optimization, semantic enhancements, Google PPC, targeted social campaigns, and strategic content planning that drive organic growth and measurable customer acquisition.

digital-marketing.bestFor: Businesses looking to generate leads, scale monthly sales, and maximize return on advertising spend (ROAS).

whatICanBuild.0: High-converting search ad campaigns on Google Ads

0.question: How do you measure campaign success?
0.answer: We track conversion metrics like cost-per-lead, cost-per-acquisition (CPA), and overall Return on Ad Spend (ROAS).

1.question: Which advertising networks should we start with?
1.answer: Google Ads is best for high intent, while Meta and LinkedIn work best for visual and professional demographic outreach.

hosting.name: Hosting & AWS DevOps
hosting.desc: Enterprise-grade cloud hosting operations, persistent state safety, CDN load-balancing, and automated backups managed with maximum speed and near-zero latency.
hosting.whatsIncluded: Professional cloud architecture configuration and server management. We optimize deployment speeds, set up load balancers, secure databases, plan backups, and minimize application latency.

whatINeedFromYou.1: Approximate traffic and database size metrics

0.question: How do you guarantee uptime?
0.answer: By using redundant server locations, automatic node failover routing, and active database mirroring.

1.question: Can you migrate our databases without downtime?
1.answer: Yes, by configuring read-replicas, syncing live transactions, and changing DNS routes at off-peak hours.

ai-solutions.name: AI Solutions
ai-solutions.desc: Seamless enterprise integration of LLMs, automatic operational flows, smart conversational agents, and data categorization models designed to lower operational overhead.
ai-solutions.whatsIncluded: Integrating advanced artificial intelligence models into business software. Includes custom LLM fine-tuning, agentic workflows, conversational assistants, classification models, and intelligent data extraction.
ai-solutions.bestFor: Enterprises wanting to reduce operational overhead, automate manual tasks, and introduce intelligence to their software.

whatICanBuild.0: AI customer support agents with custom document retrieval (RAG)

whatICanBuild.2: Intelligent document parsing and data extraction models
whatICanBuild.3: Vector database integrations (Pinecone, pgvector) for memory
whatICanBuild.4: Custom LLM integrations (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini API)

whatINeedFromYou.2: API keys or raw business documents

0.question: How do you prevent AI model hallucination?
0.answer: By grounding the LLM in vector databases using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and applying strict system validation rules.

1.question: Will my data be used to train public models?
1.answer: No. We configure API routes that do not store or use your transactions for public model training.

test-1.content: Sqodex built our Flutter app in six weeks and it launched with zero crashes on day one. These guys are the real deal.

test-2.content: Our SEO traffic grew 340% in four months. The team is responsive, data-driven, and they actually explain what they're doing.

test-3.content: We needed a complete SaaS system and a brand identity. Sqodex handled everything — on time, on budget, and better than we imagined.

test-ecommerce.content: The new storefront didn't just look better — it immediately moved the needle on revenue. We saw the conversion lift within the first week of going live. The team's obsession with performance paid off in a very measurable way.

test-ai.content: The triage system has been a game-changer. We've automated over 85% of standard routings, and compliance audits have been flawless.

test-hosting.content: The server setup has been bulletproof. We handle over 10x traffic bursts with zero slowdowns or database lockouts.

test-lumio.content: The new design tokens and Figma system have completely unified our products. Development time dropped immediately.

about_section.p1_text: is a collective of elite software engineers, creative architects, and digital strategists. We specialize in building secure, high-velocity digital products—from hyper-optimized web portals to complex, scalable enterprise SaaS systems.
about_section.p2_text: We believe in sovereign development: writing clean, modular code without bloat. By combining state-of-the-art frameworks with uncompromising quality standards, we deliver robust solutions that give our partners a definitive edge in their market.

why_choose_us_section.desc: We deliver high-performance digital products that help brands scale. Here is how we set ourselves apart from the competition.

card1.title: End-to-End Solutions
card1.desc: From strategic blueprinting to global deployment, we manage the entire technical lifecycle so your team can focus on market expansion.

card2.title: Next-Gen Stack Integration
card2.desc: Engineered using modern stacks including React, Node.js, Flutter, and Kotlin with guaranteed performance and scalability.

card3.title: Stack Flexibility
card3.desc: Tailor-made tech stack perfectly aligned with your business requirements, ensuring optimal performance, scalability, and long-term maintenance. Your vision, your stack, our expertise.

card4.title: Performance, Analytics & Support
card4.desc: Comprehensive post-launch maintenance, performance monitoring, and continuous improvement services to ensure your digital assets evolve with your business goals.

card5.title: Security Audits & Recovery
card5.desc: Protect your digital assets with our comprehensive security audit services. We identify vulnerabilities and provide robust recovery solutions to safeguard your data and operations.

card6.title: Future-Proof Innovation
card6.desc: Gain an immediate competitive edge. We inject bleeding-edge capabilities—from AI/LLMs to autonomous microservices—into your core product today.
